description: Survive the manual override
hint: Unmissable story achievement. Awarded after Wheatley crashes your motel room into the facility.

description: Reunite with GLaDOS
hint: Unmissable story achievement. Awarded when you accidentally wake up GLaDOS.

description: Complete the first Thermal Discouragement Beam test
hint: Unmissable story achievement. Complete Chamber 1.

description: Complete the first Hard Light Bridge test
hint: Unmissable story achievement. Complete Chamber 11.

description: Make a break for it
hint: Unmissable story achievement. Escape GLaDOS's testing track with Wheatley.

description: Press the button!
hint: Unmissable story achievement. Press the Stalemate Resolution Button during the core transfer.

description: Carry science forward
hint: Unmissable story achievement. Impale Potato GLaDOS onto your portal gun.

description: Master the Repulsion Gel
hint: Unmissable story achievement. Complete the first blue gel test in the old Aperture facility.

description: Master the Propulsion Gel
hint: Unmissable story achievement. Complete the first orange speed gel test.

description: Complete the first Conversion Gel test
hint: Unmissable story achievement. Complete the first white gel test.

description: Master the Excursion Funnel
hint: Unmissable story achievement. Complete the first blue tractor beam test.

description: Do the same test twice
hint: Unmissable story achievement. Awarded after completing Wheatley's first test chamber.

display_name: The Part Where He Kills You
description: This is that part
hint: Unmissable story achievement. Triggered right before the finale escape sequence begins.

description: That just happened
hint: Unmissable story achievement. Shoot a portal at the moon during the final boss fight.

description: Place a cube on a button without touching the cube
hint: In Chamber 6, catch the cube mid-air using a portal positioned directly above the button, or use a funnel to guide it down without ever pressing the grab button.

description: Complete Test Chamber 10 in 70 seconds
hint: Memorize the puzzle in Chamber 10 (the one with lasers, a cube, and faith plates). Move fast and place portals before you even land on the faith plates.

description: Show that pit who's boss
hint: At the start of Chapter 9, Wheatley will ask you to come back and jump into a deadly pit. Simply jump into it and die.

description: Break the rules in Test Chamber 07
hint: In Chamber 7, do not let the companion cube go through the fizzler. Instead, use a portal to get outside the exit door, then pull the cube through with a well-placed portal.

description: Use an Aerial Faith Plate to launch a turret
hint: In Chamber 6, when garbage flies out of the tube, catch the broken turret before it falls. Carry it to the Aerial Faith plate and drop it on.

description: Find the hidden signal in one of the Rat Man's dens
hint: In Chamber 6, grab the radio from the trash tube. Take it onto the faith plates and launch yourself to a hidden ledge on the left wall to find a Rat Man den.

description: Take GLaDOS' escape advice
hint: While escaping with Wheatley, GLaDOS will try to tempt you to jump into a testing track to your right. Ignore Wheatley and jump in.

description: Stand in a defective turret detector
hint: When you reach the turret manufacturing line, remove the 'template' master turret and step into the scanner yourself.

description: Save a turret from redemption
hint: While navigating the conveyor belts heading towards the incinerator, find the one turret that says 'I'm different!' and pick it up before it burns.

description: Catch a blue-painted box before it touches the ground
hint: In the chamber where the cube is enclosed in a glass box being sprayed by repulsion gel, break the glass with water. Grab the cube mid-air as it bounces wildly.

description: Discover the missing experiment
hint: In the highest catwalks of the 1970s area, look for a set of double doors hidden in a corner. Open them to find the drydock of the Borealis.

description: Examine all the vitrified test chamber doors
hint: Find and press the intercom button on all 6 sealed doors in the underground levels (3 in Chapter 6, 3 in Chapter 7). Listen to Cave Johnson's secret dialogue.

description: Find a hidden portrait
hint: In the 1970s office area, look for a side room containing a large painting of Cave Johnson and Caroline. GLaDOS will comment on it.

description: Refuse to solve the first test in Chapter 8
hint: When Wheatley introduces his first original 'test' (which is incredibly simple), just stand still and do absolutely nothing for about 30 seconds.

description: Break 11 test chamber monitors
hint: Throughout Chapter 8, Wheatley speaks to you through large flat-screen monitors. Use cubes, lasers, turrets, or yourself to smash 11 of them.

description: Celebrate your cooperative calibration success
hint: Unmissable in Co-op. Simply High-Five your partner at the end of the tutorial.

description: Complete all test chambers in the Team Building co-op course
hint: Complete Course 1 in Co-op mode.

description: Complete all test chambers in the Mass and Velocity co-op course
hint: Complete Course 2 in Co-op mode.

description: Complete all test chambers in the Hard-Light Surfaces co-op course
hint: Complete Course 3 in Co-op mode.

description: Complete all test chambers in the Excursion Funnels co-op course
hint: Complete Course 4 in Co-op mode.

description: Complete all test chambers in all courses of co-op
hint: Complete the final course (Course 5: Mobility Gels) in Co-op mode.

description: Never lose a cube in Chamber 6 of the Mass and Velocity co-op course
hint: In Course 2, Chamber 6, catch the cube mid-air perfectly so it never falls into the goo or gets destroyed by the fizzler.

description: Perform all 8 gestures of your own volition in co-op
hint: As you beat co-op courses, you unlock new gestures. Open the gesture wheel and perform all 8 of them.

description: Dance in front of a turret blocked by a hard light bridge in co-op
hint: Place a hard light bridge between you and a live turret, then perform a dance gesture while it tries to shoot you.

description: Drop your co-op partner in goo while they are gesturing by removing the bridge under them
hint: Have your partner stand on your hard light bridge over acid. Ask them to emote, and while they do, move your portal to drop them.

description: Find the hidden companion cube in co-op test chamber
hint: In Course 4, Chamber 9, look for a hidden area outside the main puzzle bounds. Use portals and funnels to reach the lonely Companion Cube.

description: Place a portal under your co-op partner while they are gesturing
hint: While your partner is performing any gesture, shoot a portal directly beneath their feet so they fall in.

description: After completing co-op, complete Calibration Course online with a friend who hasn’t played before
hint: You must host a game and invite someone on your Steam friends list who has NEVER played Portal 2 Co-op before, and finish the tutorial with them.

description: Perform 2 aerial gestures before touching the ground in co-op
hint: Float in an excursion funnel or create an infinite falling loop (floor/ceiling portals), then perform two gestures mid-air.

description: Complete Chamber 3 in the Hard-Light Surfaces co-op course using only 5 total portal placements
hint: Requires strict coordination in Course 3, Chamber 3. Plan exactly where the light bridge needs to go and do not misfire a single portal.

description: Enter 4 different portals without touching the ground in co-op
hint: Create an infinite falling loop with your portals. As you fall, have your partner shoot their two portals below you so you fall through all 4 colors.

description: Solve 3 co-op chambers in the Mass and Velocity course in under 60 seconds each
hint: Speedrun Course 2. Chambers 2, 3, and 4 are the easiest to finish under a minute if you and your partner know exactly what to do.

description: Complete Course 4 with neither you nor your co-op partner dying
hint: The hardest co-op achievement. You must complete the entire Excursion Funnel course (all 9 chambers) in one sitting without either player dying once.

description: Taunt GLaDOS in front of a camera in each of the five co-op courses
hint: Find a wall-mounted camera in Course 1, 2, 3, 4, and 5. Stand right in front of it and perform any gesture. Must be done across all 5 courses.

description: Win 3 co-op games of rock-paper-scissors in a row
hint: Use the Rock-Paper-Scissors gesture with your partner. The outcome is purely RNG, so just keep doing it until you win 3 consecutive times.

description: While playing co-op, hug 3 different people on your friends list
hint: You need to invite 3 separate Steam friends into your co-op lobby at different times and use the 'Hug' gesture with each of them.

description: Never lose a cube in Chamber 6 of the Mobility Gels co-op course
hint: In the Art Therapy DLC course (Course 6), Chamber 6, catch the cube perfectly and don't let it fall in the water or hit a fizzler.
